_meta.title: Letter Unit baa (ب) — bundled-seed Exercise configs (Schema v2)
_meta.signedOff: false everywhere — feedback lines are prototype-authored drafts; audioId/imageId are placeholders. Plan 07-07 seeds Firestore + the owner's mother signs off.
_meta.fallbackRole: This is the bundled-seed fallback read by CurriculumRepository.getExercises() when Firestore is empty (cold/offline first run).

prompt.line: Start at the gold dot and sweep a deep bowl, then the dot below.

feedback.pass: Beautiful — a deep, smooth bowl. أحسنت!
feedback.shallowBowl: A little shallow — give the bowl a deeper curve. Try again, slower.
feedback.noDot: The bowl is good — now place the dot just below it.

prompt.line: Trace the initial baa — no tail, it reaches forward to join.

feedback.pass: That's the initial shape — ready to join.
feedback.hasTail: No tail at the start — keep it small and flat. Try once more.

prompt.line: Trace the medial baa — a little tooth between two letters.

feedback.pass: Perfect little tooth — the medial baa.
feedback.tooBig: Smaller — a little tooth, no tail. Try again.

prompt.line: Listen, then write the letter the word starts with. No guide.

feedback.pass: Yes — “baṭṭa” starts with baa, and there it is.
feedback.wrongLetter: That's taa — listen again: بطة… b, b. Which letter makes that sound?

prompt.line: Look at the picture. Write the letter the word begins with.

feedback.shallowBowl: Make the bowl deeper with the dot below — that's baa.

prompt.line: Write baa the way it looks at the start of a word.

feedback.pass: That's the initial baa — from memory.
feedback.wrongForm: At the start, baa has no tail and reaches forward. Try again.

prompt.line: No dotted lines. Listen and write the whole word from memory.

feedback.pass: باب — from memory, no guide. Real writing! أحسنت!
feedback.missingDot: Close — your first baa needs its dot. Listen again: باب.

prompt.line: You saw the word for a moment — now write it from memory.

feedback.missingDot: Almost — check the second baa's dot. Try once more.

prompt.line: Look at the picture and write the whole word for it.

feedback.incomplete: That's the right start — finish the whole word, باب.

prompt.line: Here are the letters apart. Write them joined — keep your pen down across the word.

feedback.pass: Joined in one go — باب, “door.” أحسنت!
feedback.lifted: Don't lift between the letters — let baa reach across to join. Try again.

prompt.line: Join these into one word — watch baa take its final shape at the end.

feedback.lifted: Keep the run connected — let baa's tail return at the end.

prompt.line: The word is almost there — write the missing letter in the gap.

feedback.wrongLetter: The missing letter is baa — deep bowl, dot below. Try again.

prompt.line: One becomes two. Write the dual of باب.

feedback.missingEnding: Add the dual ending ـان: بابان.

prompt.line: One becomes many. Write the plural of باب.

feedback.wrongForm: The plural of باب is أبواب. Listen and write it.

prompt.line: Write the opposite of كبير — “big.”

feedback.wrongAntonym: The opposite of big is small — صغير.

prompt.line: Read the sentence and write the missing word.

feedback.pass: البابُ كبير — you filled it in. أحسنت!
feedback.wrongWord: A describing word fits here — try كبير (“big”).

prompt.line: Listen to the whole sentence, then write it — word by word, in order.

feedback.pass: البابُ كبير — “the door is big.” A whole sentence! أحسنت!
feedback.wrongOrder: Good start — keep the words in order: البابُ كبير.

prompt.line: Look at the picture and write a sentence that tells what you see.

feedback.pass: البابُ كبير — you wrote a sentence. أحسنت!
feedback.incomplete: Name it, then describe it: البابُ كبير.

feedback.tooShort: Make your alif taller — draw it from the very top all the way down.
feedback.wrongDirection: Start at the top and pull straight down — not from the bottom up.
feedback.tooCurved: Keep your alif straight — one tall straight line, no curve.

feedback.tooCurved: Keep it straight — alif is one straight line, no curve.
